query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @custID nvarchar(64), @status nvarchar(33), @c varchar(64), @m varchar(64), @i varchar(64), @expression varchar(64), @increase varchar(64), @tag varchar(64), @e nvarchar(511), @controller varchar(128)
select @expression = 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', @increase = 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', @tag = '000000', @custID = '%#10$', @status = '1, 2' if @ma_ct = 'HDA' select @c = 'c81$000000', @m = 'm81$', @i = 'i81$', @controller = 'SVTran' else if @ma_ct = 'HD1' select @c = 'c21$000000', @m = 'm21$', @i = 'i21$', @controller = 'ARTran' else if @ma_ct = 'HD2' select @c = 'c22$000000', @m = 'm22$', @i = 'i22$', @controller = 'SDTran' else if @ma_ct = 'HD7' select @c = 'hdtt', @m = 'hdtt', @i = 'ihdtt', @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '', @status = '1', @controller = 'RITran' else if @ma_ct = 'PXC' select @c = 'c86$000000', @m = 'm86$', @i = 'i86$', @status = '2, 3', @controller = 'PSTran' else if @ma_ct = 'PXD' select @c = 'm26$000000', @m = 'm26$000000', @i = 'i26$000000', @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '', @controller = 'PXTran'
select @custID = @custID + rtrim(@ma_kh) + '#%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end, @e = '' if @ma_ct = 'HD7' and @stt_rec_ht <> '' select @e = case when @e = '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.stt_rec <> ''' + replace(@stt_rec_ht, '''', '''''') + '''' if @ma_dvcs <> '' select @e = @e + case when @e = '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ma_dvcs = ''' + replace(@ma_dvcs, '''', '''''') + '''' &FilterInitialize;
select @$primeJoin = @$primeJoin + ' left join hddt00$%Partition h00 on a.stt_rec = h00.stt_rec' select @$primeFilter = @$primeFilter + case when @$primeFilter = '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'h00.tinh_trang_hddt = ''2''' select @$primeFilter = @$primeFilter + case when @$primeFilter = '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'not exists(select 1 from hdtt h$tt where a.stt_rec = h$tt.stt_rec_hd' + case when @stt_rec_ht = '' then '' else ' and h$tt.stt_rec <> ''' + rtrim(@stt_rec_ht) + '''' end + ')' if @ma_ct = 'HD2' begin select @$primeJoin = @$primeJoin + ' left join m22$%Partition m$22 on a.stt_rec = m$22.stt_rec' select @$primeFilter = @$primeFilter + case when @$primeFilter = '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'm$22.stt_rec_hd = ''''' end
exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @ma_ct, @c, @m, @i, 'ngay_ct', @expression, @increase, @tag, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,t_tt_nt,ma_nt', '', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', @status, '0', @unit, 0, 0, @e, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
